title: NON-RECORD SUBMISSION ----- Text_diffusion_MDLM------- improved transformer and better metrics for 600 secs
author: laox5

data.description: Uses grouped query attention with separate query heads and fewer key/value heads, expanding KV pairs internally for attention.
Uses rotary position embeddings in attention.
Non-causal bidirectional attention with mask-parallel denoising for masked diffusion language modeling.
Adds time embeddings into the residual stream before RMSNorm in attention and MLP blocks.
Masked diffusion language model training pipeline for iterative denoising from fully masked sequences.

novel_contributions: Masked diffusion language model training pipeline
Improved transformer based on a prior submission
Additive time conditioning in residual stream
Grouped query attention with reduced KV heads
Non-causal bidirectional attention for parallel denoising
Muon optimizer with mixed-precision stability handling
